title: callerya nieuwenhuisii
intro: Callerya nieuwenhuisii, also known as the Chinese snakeroot or Chinese keel, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Callerya nieuwenhuisii include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
